annotations: Same-format export: rebuild each input workbook with cleaned cell values, preserving the original layout (7 batch tabs, 11-row header band, merged cells). Output lands in SharePoint /output/cleaned/.
Runs alongside pl_export_gold_to_sp — that pipeline produces the long-form tidy view; this one produces the input-shaped view for end users who want the familiar Excel template.

scripts.text: -- Mock-only Script: rebuilds <workbook> with cleaned values and uploads to SharePoint /output/<subfolder>/.

_mock.note: Reads input xlsx from SharePoint /input + cleaned values from silver.observations_long + silver.column_mapping_log; writes a same-shape xlsx to SharePoint /output/<subfolder>/. The subfolder name comes from pipeline().parameters.subfolder. Real ADF would chain a Databricks notebook activity instead of a Script.
